text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After hearing that some of<n>Matikanefukukitaru's
choreography<n>is inspired by one of her dreams, I
go<n>to take a look...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You've finally come, Trainer! I<n>shall now
perform my lucky dance, so<n>keep your eyes on
me at all times!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: First off, I slowly crawl across the<n>floor...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And then I gradually raise my right leg<n>up toward
the sky! Hi-yaap!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you think of my<n>wondrous dance
moves?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I bet you feel luckier already!
choice_data_list:
Was that some kind of nouveau contemporary
dance?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmph! No, it was not!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But whatever, it's fine if you don't<n>understand!
I'm sure you felt our luck<n>increase, though, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I know how you feel. I was at a lossfor words once I finished thechoreography. I was that emotional!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I'd like to perform this in a<n>concert as
soon as possible!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I admire her guts, but I'm not sure the<n>lively stage
of a winning concert is<n>the right place to showcase
this<n>particular dance...
choice_data_list: Sure, it can't hurt to try!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Uh, yeah, I sure hope it wouldn'thurt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little shocked! But strangely<n>enough, I feel a
little excited about this<n>now!

I'll keep the moves just as they<n>were
communicated to me so as not<n>to extinguish my
heart's blazing<n>flame!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll put on the most dazzling<n>performance of the
whole concert!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I need to go review my dream for<n>some extra
practice! Night night!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a quick nap, she incorporates<n>even more
"wondrous" dance moves<n>into the choreography.
Her finished<n>product is quite dynamic.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm! Energetic, you say?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh... I guess I should avoid<n>unnecessary
movements. If I cut that<n>part out and change some
things<n>around...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh? Oh ho! Let's give this a<n>shot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Boom shakalaka! ♪ Wassup y'all!<n>It's your girl,
Matikanefukukitaru! I<n>want this bonfire lit, so
lemme hear<n>you clap!

Believers, put your hands to the sky!
Non-believers, listen up and let me<n>open your third
eye! Whoop whoop!

Her hip-hop-inspired dance isn't quite<n>what I
expected, but it certainly is<n>more energetic.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I can't wait to show this to<n>everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A very enthusiastic practice session<n>is all it takes
to liven up her dance<n>skills.
